steps.title: Join the main clauses
steps.content: The sentence has two main clauses: Po'Pay was instrumental in organizing the Pueblo Revolt, and the Spanish colonizers were expelled for a time. The blank must include the year and correctly join those clauses.

steps.title: Apply the boundary rule
steps.content: Choice A fuses the clauses with no punctuation. Choice B omits the year and makes the phrase ungrammatical. Choice C creates a comma splice. The remaining choice supplies the year plus a comma and coordinating conjunction. The answer is D.
